Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Paul Vallancourt, Esq. for Petitioner: Krista Meyer, as Guardian at litem for: Lauren Meyer-Clark, a minor Claimant, appearance waived.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $12,424.46 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,758.22
Costs $1,391.58
A net balance of $8,274.66 to be deposited into a blocked account with Twin City Co-Op, 8700 University Ave., N.W. Blaine, MN. 55448, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
